meaning: n.[微]病毒(成熟)粒子,毒粒,病毒体
examples: VP7, the most conserved protein of the virion, is serogroup-specific antigen.
One important aspect of virus replication mechanisms is the way how virion assembly and budding from cell membrane.
Neuraminidase (NA) is an important protein on the surface of virion and plays an important role in immune and lethality.
